seoTitle: Bellevue Hill vs Bellingen — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bellevue Hill and Bellingen. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bellevue Hill vs Bellingen: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bellevue Hill and Bellingen.
heading: Bellevue Hill vs Bellingen — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bellevue Hill, New South Wales and Bellingen, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bellevue Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Bellingen (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bellevue Hill or Bellingen safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bellevue Hill has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Bellingen scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bellevue Hill scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Bellingen scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bellevue Hill or Bellingen?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bellevue Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
